summary: Workflow v1/v2 contract, migration, rollback, restore, schemas, upgrade, and compatibility surfaces pass independent review at 827ea46e.
findings: Deterministic receipt replay, future-version restore rejection, and invalid UTF-8 fail before writes; focused workflow tests pass 82/82 and migration plus file-ops pass 20/20.
residual_risks: Static symlink checks leave a narrow TOCTOU window before atomic rename; canonical Bun-only checks require hosted CI because Bun is unavailable locally.
